headline: 1 Semiconductor Stock to Consider Right Now and 2 We Ignore
summary: Semiconductors are the core infrastructure powering the Information Age. Compute-intensive AI workloads are also priming them for the next wave of secular growth, so it’s no wonder the industry has outperformed the market over the past six months, delivering returns of 68.1% compared to 4.8% for the S&P 500.
